name: MermaidMaker

releases.author: Akitaroh
releases.description:
0.1.1: address Obsidian Community automated review findings.

## What changed

- No runtime `<style>` element creation — all custom CSS moved to a static `styles.css` (bundled via esbuild)
- Replaced inline `element.style.cssText` / `style.color` / `style.whiteSpace` with CSS classes
- `activeDocument` / `window.setTimeout` for Obsidian popout-window compatibility
- `getActiveViewOfType(MarkdownView)` instead of deprecated `workspace.activeLeaf?.view`
- Cleaned up unnecessary regex escapes, type assertions, and unused catch bindings
- Properly typed the mermaid instance loaded via `loadMermaid()`

No behavior changes for end users; addresses code-quality items flagged by the Community Plugin review.
releases.name: 0.1.1 (beta)

releases.author: Akitaroh
releases.description:
First public beta of MermaidMaker for Obsidian, released from the dedicated plugin repo.

> The world's first inline GUI Mermaid editor for Obsidian.

## Features

- 🖱 Drag nodes on a visual canvas, positions saved to the Mermaid block
- ➕ Add / remove nodes and edges (toolbar button or Delete key)
- ✏️ Edit labels by double-clicking a node
- 🔗 \`[[wikilinks]]\` clickable inside nodes (Obsidian hover preview / unresolved styling all work)
- \`#tags\`, \`\$math\$\`, \`**bold**\` render inside nodes
- 📐 dagre auto-layout for newly added nodes
- 💾 Two-way sync to the underlying Mermaid block

## Quick start

\`\`\`mermaid-maker
%%editable%%
graph LR
  A[Start] --> B[Auth]
  B --> C[End]
\`\`\`

Switch to Reading view (\`cmd+e\`) to interact.

## Install via BRAT

1. Install [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat) from Community Plugins.
2. BRAT settings → Add Beta plugin → \`Akitaroh/obsidian-mermaid-maker\`
3. Enable MermaidMaker.

(If you tested via \`Akitaroh/mermaid-maker\` earlier — please remove it and re-add via this new repo path.)

## Notes on this release

This is the first release from the dedicated plugin repository. Earlier beta releases lived under \`Akitaroh/mermaid-maker/packages/obsidian/\`. Source content is functionally identical; the new repo simplifies submission to the Obsidian community plugin store.
releases.name: 0.1.0 (beta)
